ddls:
CREATE TABLE "control_data" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control data entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the process */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor providing the data */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the actuator used for control */,
  "y_k_minus_1" REAL /* Value of the process variable at time step k-1 */,
  "y_k_minus_2" REAL /* Value of the process variable at time step k-2 */,
  "u_k_minus_1" REAL /* Value of the control input at time step k-1 */,
  "exec_time" REAL /* Execution time of the control algorithm */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for simulations */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data entry is an anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly, if any */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user (operator) associated with the data entry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the data was collected */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the machine or equipment involved in the process */,
  "control_algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm used */,
  "control_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the control system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES process_parameters ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES process_parameters ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES process_parameters ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_y_k_minus_1 FOREIGN KEY ("y_k_minus_1") REFERENCES process_parameters ("param_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_data_u_k_minus_1 FOREIGN KEY ("u_k_minus_1") REFERENCES process_parameters ("param_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process parameter */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the process */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor associated with the parameter */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the actuator associated with the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., process variable, control input) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable range around the target value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the parameter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the parameter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)
